mapper.select: SELECT t.month, t.cid, c.name AS categoryName, c.img AS categoryImg, c.color AS categoryColor, t.cnt AS count FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(date, '%Y-%m') AS month, cid, COUNT(*) AS cnt, RANK() OVER ( PARTITION BY DATE_FORMAT(date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS rnk FROM BUDGET WHERE uid = #{uid} AND type = 'expense' GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(date, '%Y-%m'), cid ) t JOIN CATEGORY c ON c.id = t.cid WHERE t.rnk = 1 ORDER BY t.month DESC LIMIT 6
